data.title: Russians’ investments in crypto derivatives heading towards $50 million
data.description:
The Russian population’s investments in domestic cryptocurrency derivatives are growing, but pose no risk for the country’s financial system, according to the Bank of Russia. Most individual investors maintain relatively small portfolios, and the bulk of the trading volume comes from fewer large participants in the nascent market, the regulator has found. Russian households invest […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russians-investments-in-crypto-derivatives-heading-towards-50-million/

data.title: SOL Holds $140 Support as Upbit Hack Fails to Shake Solana Ecosystem
data.description:
Solana (SOL) is showing remarkable resilience this week, holding firmly above the critical $140 support zone despite heightened market anxiety following a $37 million hack on South Korea’s Upbit exchange. Related Reading: The Bull And Bear Scenario For XRP That Could Play Out In November The stability comes at a time when institutional interest in Solana is accelerating, highlighted by Franklin Templeton’s recent Form 8-A filing with the U. S. SEC to launch a Solana ETF
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/solana/sol-holds-140-support-as-upbit-hack-fails-to-shake-solana-ecosystem/
